  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractModel
    Base class for models that need to notify observers about state changes.
    Attendee
    A guest invited to an event, identified by a name and an optional e-mail.
    CalendarModel
    Holds all of the state the application needs: the event list, the currently displayed date, the active view mode and the dark-mode flag.
    CalendarMonthPanel
    Month view: a grid of the whole month.
    CalendarSubView
    A swappable central view of the calendar (day, week, month or year).
    CalendarView
    Main window of the application.
    Controller
    Connects the interface to the model.
    DatePickerDialog
    Small modal calendar used to pick a date with the mouse instead of typing it into spinners.
    DayEventsPanel
    Side panel that shows the events of the selected day.
    DayViewPanel
    Day view: an hour-by-hour agenda (00:00 to 23:00) of the model's current view date.
    Event
    Represents a single calendar event.
    EventFormDialog
    Form window to create or edit an event.
    EventStorage
    Persists events to (and loads them from) a plain text file.
    EventValidationException
    Thrown when the data supplied for an event is invalid.
    Icons
    Helper that loads and scales the application icons, picking the colour variant that matches the active theme.
    Main
    Application entry point.
    Recurrence
    Repetition rule that an event may follow.
    ReminderService
    Runs on a separate daemon thread and periodically checks whether any event is approaching its reminder time.
    StorageException
    Signals a problem while reading or saving the events file.
    ThemeColors
    Colour palette used by the interface.
    TopPanel
    Top bar holding the view-mode toggles, the navigation arrows, the date label, the search field, the theme switch and the create/edit buttons.
    ViewMode
    The granularity of the central calendar view.
    WeekViewPanel
    Week view: seven columns (Sunday to Saturday) for the week that contains the model's current view date.
    YearViewPanel
    Year view: the twelve months of the model's current year shown as small grids.
